perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a patterned grey sweater, a brown scarf, and white gloves, waves enthusiastically at the camera in a vast snowy field with a single pine tree in the distance. (2) The camera pans to the right, revealing a dense crowd of tourists and a long queue in the same snowy environment, with people standing around and taking photos. (3) The woman is shown again with a tired facial expression and a slight pout. (4) Subsequent shots alternate between the large crowd standing in the snow and the woman looking resigned to the wait.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Bouncy, quirky, and slightly comedic instrumental music begins and continues throughout the video. (2) No vocals or spoken dialogue are detected during the recording. (3) Low-level ambient environmental noise is masked by the loud background music. (4) No distinct sound effects are present.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '美瑛聖誕樹的真相 The Real-Life Biei Lone Tree' (Informative hook). (2) Decorative Text: '????????' (Expressing confusion or shock at the crowd). (3) Decorative Text: '無限等待' (Infinite waiting - Frustrated tone). (4) Decorative Text: '無限排隊' (Infinite queuing - Tired tone). (5) Decorative Text: '(早就放棄)' (Gave up long ago - Humorous resignation).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Idealistic intro -> Reveal of crowd reality -> Reaction montage

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in foreground, at least 19 tourists in the background crowd.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman wearing a grey and white Nordic-style patterned sweater, a brown knitted scarf, and white knitted gloves.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A vast, open field completely covered in deep white snow under a blue sky with scattered clouds. A single, tall pine tree stands prominently on a hill in the distance.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Contrast Reveal -> Emotional Reaction
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To debunk the idealized 'lonely' image of the Biei Christmas Tree tourist spot by showing the reality of overtourism and the massive crowds/waiting times required to get a photo.

social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses humorous text overlays and a comedic music track to mock the trend of 'perfect' travel photos.
